Our Projects

Residential 980 sq ft

Stamped Concrete Driveway

Double-wide stamped concrete driveway with ashlar slate pattern and walnut stain. Includes decorative border and concrete sealer.

Distribution Warehouse Slab

Reinforced concrete slab for a new distribution warehouse, including loading dock aprons and exterior truck approach.

Wichita, KS
Residential 640 sq ft

Backyard Patio & Steps

Custom exposed aggregate patio with a two-step transition to lawn grade and a connecting walkway to the side gate.

Derby, KS
Commercial 24,000 sq ft

Retail Strip Mall Parking Lot

Full concrete parking lot replacement for an 8-unit retail strip center, with ADA-compliant curbs, ramps, and accessible stalls.

Residential 720 sq ft

Garage Floor & Apron

Three-car garage floor with vapor barrier, rebar reinforcement, smooth trowel finish, and a new concrete apron.

Commercial 11,500 sq ft

Auto Dealership Lot Expansion

Concrete inventory display area expansion with heavy-duty reinforcement for vehicle display, including ornamental curbing.

Decorative Walkway System

Front-to-back concrete walkway with stamped borders, broom-finish center, and landscape lighting conduit chase.

Family-owned and operated, Ortega & Sons Concrete delivers expert residential and commercial concrete work throughout the Wichita, KS area. Quality craftsmanship on every pour.

  • Residential Driveways
